events.title: Nscale raises $2B Series C at $14.6B valuation, plans IPO in 2026
events.summary: UK AI infrastructure startup Nscale raised $2B in Series C at $14.6B valuation.

events.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 preview: 'World-surprising' chip and agentic AI era
events.summary: GTC 2026 starts March 16. Jensen Huang to unveil 'world-surprising' chip.

events.title: Nvidia funding AI boom with billions in global startup investments
events.summary: Nvidia invested $30B in OpenAI ($110B round with Amazon, SoftBank).

events.title: US drafts sweeping export control rules requiring permits for all AI chip sales
events.summary: US Commerce Dept drafted rules requiring government approval for AI chip exports worldwide.

events.title: Baseten raises $300M at $5B valuation, half from Nvidia
events.summary: Baseten raised $300M at $5B valuation, more than doubling from $2.1B in Sept.

events.title: CoreWeave securities fraud class action deadline March 13
events.summary: Lead plaintiff deadline of March 13, 2026 in Masaitis v. CoreWeave securities fraud class action.

events.title: MCP donated to Linux Foundation's Agentic AI Foundation
events.summary: Anthropic donated MCP to the Linux Foundation's new Agentic AI Foundation.

events.title: Perplexity Deep Research now runs on Opus 4.6
events.summary: Perplexity Deep Research now runs on Opus 4.6. Pivoted to subscription-first model.

events.title: Exa AI opens first European office in Zurich, launches Exa Deep
events.summary: Exa AI opened Zurich office as first European presence. Unveiled Exa Deep.

events.title: Lambda Labs eyes 2026 IPO after $480M raise at $2.5B valuation
events.summary: Lambda raised $480M Series D at ~$2.5B valuation. Retained MS, JPM, Citi for IPO.

events.title: NVIDIA $20B licensing deal with Groq for inference
events.summary: NVIDIA secured a $20B licensing deal with startup Groq.

events.title: AWS Bedrock AgentCore launches with multi-framework agent support
events.summary: AWS Bedrock AgentCore supports Strands, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, Google ADK.

events.title: NVIDIA invests $2B in Nebius Group at 8.3% stake
events.summary: Nvidia invested $2B in Nebius Group (8.3% stake), planning to deploy 5GW+ of Nvidia systems. Nebius planning 300MW campus in New Jersey.

events.title: Exa AI raises $85M Series B led by Benchmark
events.summary: Exa AI raised $85M Series B led by Benchmark, positioning as AI-native search engine built for AI agents.

events.title: Cerebras raises $1B H-round at $23B valuation, plans Q2 IPO
events.summary: Cerebras raised $1B H-round at $23B valuation. Planning Q2 2026 IPO as the first pure-play AI chip company to list publicly.

events.title: Anthropic flagged as DoD supply chain risk over ethics stance
events.summary: US Defense Dept flagged Anthropic as supply chain risk after Anthropic refused to allow its tech for mass surveillance and autonomous weapons. 30+ OpenAI/Google employees signed in solidarity.

events.title: Glean reaches $200M ARR, doubles revenue in 9 months
events.summary: Glean hit $200M ARR, doubling revenue in 9 months. Company pivoting to AI middleware/agent layer with real-time voice and agent sandbox features.

events.title: Modal Labs in fundraising talks at $2.5B valuation with ~$50M ARR
events.summary: Modal Labs in fundraising discussions at $2.5B valuation with ~$50M ARR, signaling growing momentum for serverless AI inference.

events.title: US withdraws global AI chip export license draft rule
events.summary: US Commerce Dept withdrew the draft rule requiring government approval for all global AI chip exports. The rule was submitted for review on Feb 26 but quickly pulled back.

events.title: Amazon and Cerebras form 'decoupled inference' alliance
events.summary: Amazon and Cerebras announced Trainium3-CSE-3 integration for decoupled inference architecture, promising 10x real-time AI generation speed. AWS deployment starting Q3 2026.

events.title: Anthropic opens million-token context window to all users
events.summary: Anthropic confirmed Claude's ~750K word context window is now available to all users, positioning as enterprise-grade alternative. Annual revenue approaching $19B.

companies.name: Perplexity
companies.note: Deep Research upgraded to Opus 4.6; subscription-first pivot; $400M Snapchat deal

companies.name: Glean

companies.name: AMD
